'''tongamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbagey|cabbagey]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbagey|cabbagey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tongamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tongamithi|tongamithi]] || [[word:tongamiji|tongamiji]] || [[word:tongamishi|tongamishi]] || [[word:tongamiki|tongamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tongamuthuthu|tongamuthuthu]] || [[word:tongamujuju|tongamujuju]] || [[word:tongamushushu|tongamushushu]] || [[word:tongamukuku|tongamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tongamuthu|tongamuthu]] || [[word:tongamuju|tongamuju]] || [[word:tongamushu|tongamushu]] || [[word:tongamuku|tongamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tongamufthuf|tongamufthuf]] || [[word:tongamufjuf|tongamufjuf]] || [[word:tongamufshuf|tongamufshuf]] || [[word:tongamufkuf|tongamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tongamethe|tongamethe]] || [[word:tongameje|tongameje]] || [[word:tongameshe|tongameshe]] || [[word:tongameke|tongameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tongamothotho|tongamothotho]] || [[word:tongamojojo|tongamojojo]] || [[word:tongamoshosho|tongamoshosho]] || [[word:tongamokoko|tongamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tongamotho|tongamotho]] || [[word:tongamojo|tongamojo]] || [[word:tongamosho|tongamosho]] || [[word:tongamoko|tongamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tongamofthof|tongamofthof]] || [[word:tongamofjof|tongamofjof]] || [[word:tongamofshof|tongamofshof]] || [[word:tongamofkof|tongamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tongamïfthïf|tongamïfthïf]] || [[word:tongamïfjïf|tongamïfjïf]] || [[word:tongamïfshïf|tongamïfshïf]] || [[word:tongamïfkïf|tongamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tongamïfthïfthïf|tongamïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:tongamïfjïfjïf|tongamïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:tongamïfshïfshïf|tongamïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:tongamïfkïfkïf|tongamïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tongamïfthïf|tongamïfthïf]] || [[word:tongamïfjïf|tongamïfjïf]] || [[word:tongamïfshïf|tongamïfshïf]] || [[word:tongamïfkïf|tongamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tongamïfthïf|tongamïfthïf]] || [[word:tongamïfjïf|tongamïfjïf]] || [[word:tongamïfshïf|tongamïfshïf]] || [[word:tongamïfkïf|tongamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tongamæthæ|tongamæthæ]] || [[word:tongamæjæ|tongamæjæ]] || [[word:tongamæshæ|tongamæshæ]] || [[word:tongamækæ|tongamækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tongamathatha|tongamathatha]] || [[word:tongamajaja|tongamajaja]] || [[word:tongamashasha|tongamashasha]] || [[word:tongamakaka|tongamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tongamatha|tongamatha]] || [[word:tongamaja|tongamaja]] || [[word:tongamasha|tongamasha]] || [[word:tongamaka|tongamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tongamafthaf|tongamafthaf]] || [[word:tongamafjaf|tongamafjaf]] || [[word:tongamafshaf|tongamafshaf]] || [[word:tongamafkaf|tongamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tongamasha|tongamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tongamshësha|tongamshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tongamrosha|tongamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tongamusha|tongamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tongamyasha|tongamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotongamnkshësha|gotongamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotongamnkrosha|gotongamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotongamnkmusha|gotongamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotongamnkyasha|gotongamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tongangamasha|tongangamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tongangamshësha|tongangamshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tongangamrosha|tongangamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tongangamusha|tongangamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tongangamyasha|tongangamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotongangamnkshësha|gotongangamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotongangamnkrosha|gotongangamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotongangamnkmusha|gotongangamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotongangamnkyasha|gotongangamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tengæmasha|tengæmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tengæmshësha|tengæmshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tengæmrosha|tengæmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tengæmusha|tengæmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tengæmyasha|tengæmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotengæmnkshësha|gotengæmnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotengæmnkrosha|gotengæmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotengæmnkmusha|gotengæmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotengæmnkyasha|gotengæmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tongfamasha|tongfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tongfamshësha|tongfamshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tongfamrosha|tongfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tongfamusha|tongfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tongfamyasha|tongfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotongfamnkshësha|gotongfamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotongfamnkrosha|gotongfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotongfamnkmusha|gotongfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotongfamnkyasha|gotongfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
